mapper.sql: select c.camera_id, c.camera_name, c.ip_addr, c.username, c.password, c.rtsp_url, c.chute_id, chute.chute_name, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from device_camera c left join device_chute chute on chute.chute_id = c.chute_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = c.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into device_camera(camera_name, ip_addr, username, password, rtsp_url, chute_id, dept_id, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{cameraName}, #{ipAddr}, #{username}, #{password}, #{rtspUrl}, #{chuteId}, #{deptId}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update device_camera set del_flag = '2' where camera_id in
#{cameraId}
